'''Lyrre T'enna''' was a [[Zoologist/Legends|zoologist]] active during the height of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. For many [[Standard year/Legends|years]], she traveled from [[Planet/Legends|planet]] to planet, studying the physiology and behavior of many wild [[Sentience/Legends|non-sentient]] creatures and reporting on them in her field journal. Over the course of her journeys, T'enna researched various planets and inhabited [[Moon/Legends|moons]], including [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]], [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], [[Dagobah/Legends|Dagobah]], [[Endor/Legends|Endor]], [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]], [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]], [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] and [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]].<ref name="WoSW" /> Since the once-beautiful world of [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]] had been [[Destruction of Alderaan/Legends|destroyed]] by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]],<ref name="EA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> the zoologist could not research that planet directly, and she turned to the [[Holographic Zoo of Extinct Animals]]. Eventually, Lyrre T'enna's field journal was reworked into a [[Lyrre T'enna's annotated field guide|published version]], which was written with the collaboration of the [[Intergalactic Zoological Society]].<ref name="WoSW" />

==Behind the scenes==
Written backwards, "Lyrre T" is Terryl, first name of [[Terryl Whitlatch]], real-world author of ''[[The Wildlife of Star Wars: A Field Guide]]'' and creature concept artist on [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']].
